name: Chip Eng Seng Corporation Ltd
summary: Chip Eng Seng Corporation Ltd, an investment holding company, engages in the construction, property development and investment, and hospitality businesses primarily in Singapore, Australia, Malaysia, and Maldives. The company operates through Construction, Property Developments, Property Investments, Hospitality, and Corporate and Others segments. The company constructs public housing projects, condominiums, executive condominiums, modular buildings, and industrial and commercial projects; develops residential, commercial, and industrial properties, as well as manages development projects; and provides real estate management and consultancy services. It also leases investment properties, such as shophouses, office buildings, and industrial properties; operates hotels and island resort; and invests in marketable securities. In addition, the company acts as general building contractor; manufactures and trades in precast products; and provides general building engineering, financial, and treasury services. Further, the company operates Repton-brand pre-school center in Singapore. Chip Eng Seng Corporation Ltd was incorporated in 1998 and is headquartered in Singapore.
